name: Parting Shot
flavor: The Clone doesn't just fall. It goes out in one last burst of stagelight, and whoever struck it wishes they'd looked away.
castingTime: 1 reaction, which you take when one of your Clones is destroyed
description: When a Clone of yours is destroyed — by an attack, by Mirror Image, by Decoy Detonation, or by any other means — you can flood the space it occupied with a last flare of false light. Each creature within 5 feet of the Clone's former space must succeed on a Constitution saving throw against your {{trick save DC|8 + proficiency bonus + your trick ability modifier}} or be blinded until the end of its next turn. This trick does not create, spend, or restore any Clones on its own — it only triggers off a Clone that is already being destroyed some other way.
sheetSummary: Reaction when a Clone is destroyed (any cause), 5 ft, cooldown 2. Con save vs trick DC or blinded until end of its next turn. Doesn't cost or grant Clones.
